Vibeport
Daily curated email newsletters for live music and concert updates in South Korea.

Vibeport is a specialized information service designed for music enthusiasts and concert-goers in South Korea. We bridge the gap between fans and their favorite artists by providing timely, organized, and localized concert data delivered straight to their inbox every morning.

Core Services
Daily Morning Newsletter: A curated list of newly announced and upcoming concerts in South Korea.

Artist Tracking: Real-time updates on domestic and international artists performing in Korea.

Ticketing Alerts: Critical information regarding ticket open dates, platforms, and venue details.

Localized Insights: Comprehensive coverage of both major K-pop events and indie/underground performances.

Target Audience
Music fans residing in or visiting South Korea.

Expatriates and tourists looking for local cultural events.

Event planners and industry professionals tracking the Korean live music market.

Key Information Provided
Artist Name: Both soloists and groups.

Date & Time: Precise scheduling for all performance rounds.

Venue Details: Locations across major Korean cities (Seoul, Busan, Incheon, etc.).

Ticket Links: Direct access to official ticketing platforms (Interpark, Yes24, Melon Ticket, etc.).

Why Vibeport?
Vibeport eliminates the need to manually check multiple ticketing sites and social media pages. By aggregating fragmented data into a single, clean email, we ensure fans never miss a "ticketing war" for their favorite shows.
